title: indigofera disticha
intro: Indigofera disticha, also known as the twin-leaf indigo, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits associated with Indigofera disticha include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Indigofera disticha is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies to leverage its medicinal properties.
